heading: This Afternoon
text: Partly to mostly cloudy, with scattered showers. Highs from the upper 50s to mid 60s north, and mid 60s to around 70 south. North to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Partly cloudy. Chance of an early shower in the northern mountains, then scattered showers northeast. Lows from the mid 40s to around 50. Winds diminishing to light and variable, except continuing from the north at  5 to 10 mph in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys.

heading: Friday
text: Partly to mostly cloudy. Afternoon showers likely near and north of Route 4, a rising chance late to the south; thunder possible. Highs again in the mid to upper 60s, with some lower 60s far north, and some lower 70s in southern valleys. West to southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph in the St. Lawrence Valley.
